description: DAZ interacting zinc finger protein 1 like [Source:HGNC Symbol;Acc:HGNC:26551]
ciliary_role: Role in Hh sig ling and ciliogenesis. It promotes ciliary bud formation by removing Cp110 from the distal end of the mother centriole, and is required for the integrity of the transition zone as it is implicated in mainte nce of the periciliary diffusion barrier at the ciliary transition zone. Regulates the localisation of Cby to the appemdahes of mother centriole. (29487109, 28530676)
ciliopathy_type: Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease, Autosomal Recessive Polycystic Kidney Disease
